responseMessageContents.text: The user confirmed "Verified this now" — they've verified the owner auto-login removal works as expected. The task is complete. No further action needed from me. The system context about a "new project" is clearly a false positive since we just completed a major auth change on an existing 330K+ line IVX Holdings workspace.

Great — the owner manual login requirement is verified and live. The owner account now requires email + password on every launch, with no automatic session restoration from any of the three previously-identified paths. All admin surfaces (Admin HQ, Variables, Access Control, IVX Owner AI) stay protected until manual owner auth succeeds.

Is there anything else you'd like me to tackle next?
